query:
ALTER TABLE cf_projects 
  ADD COLUMN preDevMonths INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 6,
  ADD COLUMN escrowDepositPct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 20.00,
  ADD COLUMN contractorAdvancePct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.00,
  ADD COLUMN liquidityBufferPct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 5.00,
  ADD COLUMN constructionCostTotal BIGINT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN buaSqft INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN constructionCostPerSqft INT DEFAULT NULL;
